content_blocks.text:
## 16. Record Keeping

### 16.1 Statutory and Regulatory Basis

#### 16.1.1 PMLA Obligations (Paragraph 6.1)

In accordance with Sections 12(1)(a) and 12(1)(e) of the PMLA and Paragraph 6.1 of the 2026 FIU-IND Guidelines, the Company shall retain records as specified under the PMLA.

The Company shall ensure that all such documents and records are:

(a) Securely preserved during the retention period;

(b) Not destroyed during the retention period;

(c) Readily retrievable upon request by competent authorities.
